title: Dynamic Entropy Genuineness Framework V2.1
subtitle: Structural evolution of Transformers via Thermodynamic Regularization and Recurrence.
description:
# Model Summary
This model implements the Dynamic Entropy Genuineness Framework (Version 2.1 Refined). It uses mechanistic interpretability to distinguish between mechanical pattern matching and genuine computation through G-score monitoring.

# Model Characteristics
- **Architecture**: Genuine Transformer (V2.1 Refined)
- **Embeddings**: Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE)
- **Layers**: 4 Layers (2 Reasoner, 2 Decoder)
- **Recurrence**: Dynamic reasoning loops (max_loops=3)
- **Vocab Size**: 1000 tokens

# Data Overview
- **Task**: Complex Multi-Step Parity Logic
- **Objective**: Structural sustainment of high-variance attention states.

# Evaluation Results
Evaluated using attention entropy variance (G-score). The model sustains reasoning depth through dynamic recurrence loops when elaboration pull is detected.

# Source & Provenance
- **Original Author**: hichambedrani
- **Framework**: Dynamic Entropy Genuineness Framework
- **Public Notebook**: [Genuine Transformer V2.1 Advanced Training](https://www.kaggle.com/code/hichambedrani/genuine-transformer-v2-advanced)

# Usage
This model is designed to be used with the `genuine_model.py` and `kaggle_analysis.py` scripts included in the associated Kaggle Kernel.
